IBM WebSphere Portal
An official State of Ohio site. Here’s how you know

Official websites use Ohio.gov

An Ohio.gov website belongs to an official government organization in the State of Ohio.

Secure .gov websites use HTTPS

A lock or https:// means you've safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Trusted applications are secured by OHID

When you log in with OHID, your privacy, data, and personal information are protected by federal and state digital security standards.

Close

Fact-Finding Reports
February 19, 2019 | Agency

All Fact-Finding Reports issued since 2012.

View Bargaining Unit Descriptions
SERB uses bargaining unit codes to identify like bargaining unit types across different employers.

Updated: June 3, 2026
Note: The browser zoom level and screen size impacts the table columns displayed at one time.

Accessibility Notice

These documents are public records made available online to provide quick and convenient access. They were submitted by external stakeholders and have been tagged for ADA accessibility; however, because they were created using a variety of methods and formats, we cannot guarantee that each document fully meets ADA accessibility standards. If you experience any difficulty accessing a document on this site, submit a request for an accessible version. Your feedback is important to us, and we remain committed to continually improving accessibility.
